visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, straight dark hair, dressed in a navy blue off-the-shoulder ruffled top, blue denim jeans, and a dark blue beret, is seen from behind walking through a wide Costco aisle. She is walking away from the camera toward the center of the warehouse. She looks back over her shoulder with a joyful, excited expression, her eyes wide and mouth open in a smile. The aisle is flanked by high shelves stacked with numerous yellow and green boxes of snack crackers. The floor is polished gray concrete, and the lighting is bright, cool-toned industrial warehouse lighting. (2) The woman stands in front of a massive vertical stack of blue "Guai Guai" snack boxes. She points enthusiastically at the cartoon character on the box, which features a blue-haired character with a big toothy grin. She gestures with both hands, her face animated as she speaks directly toward the camera. In the background, other shoppers are visible as small, blurred figures further down the aisle. A large "COSTCO WHOLESALE" logo is superimposed on the top of the frame. (3) The scene cuts to a price tag close-up on the shelf, displaying "$ 289" in large black font. The woman then appears again, holding a single large blue box with both hands, showing the size and weight relative to her body. She smiles broadly, looking into the lens. The background consists of rows of large warehouse shelving units. (4) The environment shifts to a cozy indoor living room setting with warm, soft lighting. Two women are sitting side-by-side at a white table. The main woman from the previous scene (still in the beret) and a friend with long dark hair in a purple top are unboxing individual green and blue snack bags. On the table, there is a small wooden tray containing several peanut-shaped puffed snacks. They hold up the bags to the camera, gesturing with their hands as they taste and review the product. Behind them, several plush toys and a soft gray couch are visible in the background, creating a domestic, relaxed atmosphere.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Variety]: 沒跌倒 !!!. (3) [Slogan]: 因為好事花生了. (4) [Subtitle]: 這個隔了10年他終於補出了. (5) [Variety]: 快10年了. (6) [Subtitle]: 雖然椰子是我們常吃的口味. (7) [Subtitle]: 可是花生已經停產. (8) [Subtitle]: 上一次出現的是... (9) [Subtitle]: 還在回想還是黑白電視的年代. (10) [Subtitle]: 對就是很久他終於有了. (11) [Subtitle]: 然後現在好市多為了要吃花生口味. (12) [Subtitle]: 只好也一起買. (13) [Subtitle]: 一包是24塊錢. (14) [Subtitle]: 回去吃看看花生口味有沒有那麼厲害. (15) [Subtitle]: 好事終於花生了. (16) [Subtitle]: 我乖乖最喜歡吃椰子口味. (17) [Subtitle]: 我也是. (18) [Variety]: 絕版10年. (19) [Subtitle]: 乖乖終於回歸了. (20) [Subtitle]: 果然是好事會花生. (21) [Subtitle]: 那它這一包呢都是24塊錢. (22) [Subtitle]: 大家有吃過椰香口味的它是比較脆糖. (23) [Subtitle]: 那我們這個花生口味呢. (24) [Variety]: 非常的多. (25) [Subtitle]: 花生的香氣非常的濃郁但是它甜度比較低. (26) [Subtitle]: 那它吃起來也比較鬆比較綿. (27) [Subtitle]: 就是我覺得是會慢慢化在嘴裡的. (28) [Subtitle]: 對椰子的那個比較要嚼開. (29) [Subtitle]: 比較脆比較硬. (30) [Variety]: 比較綿密的感覺. (31) [Subtitle]: 我覺得很棒最重要是它這個甜度很低. (32) [Subtitle]: 所以會讓人忍不住一口接一口. (33) [Subtitle]: 難怪絕版10年還是很多人都很想念.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in a beret, 1 female friend appearing in the second half for the review.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main woman has long dark hair and wears a navy blue off-the-shoulder ruffled top, blue jeans, and a dark blue beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a large-scale Costco warehouse with high metal shelving units and concrete floors, then transitions to a domestic living room with a white table and plush decorations.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-arousal, upbeat electronic pop track characterized by a bright synthesizer melody and a steady 4/4 drum beat. A female voice enters immediately with a high pitch and rapid speech rate, laughing and expressing intense excitement. The acoustic texture reflects a large, open indoor space with a subtle natural reverb. (2) A sharp, clear "ding" sound effect, resembling a service bell or digital notification, punctuate the audio track as the narrator points out specific information. The background music remains constant in volume and tempo. The narrator's voice is highly enunciated and clear, maintaining a positive and persuasive tone. (3) The background environment shifts to a more damped, intimate indoor setting. The music continues, but the primary audio layer now includes the distinct, crisp sounds of plastic bags being rustled and crinkled. A second female voice joins the first, creating a casual, friendly dialogue. (4) Short, playful "pop" sound effects are synchronized with visual text overlays. The two voices maintain a conversational yet high-energy level, with frequent overlaps of laughter and agreement. The background music maintains its energetic drive until the end of the clip, ensuring a consistent high-tempo rhythm throughout the narrative.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Discovery -> Evidence -> Detailed Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform viewers about the return of a nostalgic peanut-flavored 'Guai Guai' snack at Costco after a 10-year hiatus. The creator uses a high-energy, 'treasure hunting' style vlog format to build excitement, followed by a detailed tasting review at home to compare the product's texture and flavor with the more common coconut variety.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcase of product packaging, price tags at Costco, and a favorable taste test review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video's impact relies on nostalgia for a discontinued product and the 'limited availability' appeal of warehouse shopping. The dual-location filming (store vs. home) adds credibility to the review.
